transcript.text:
Hi there! I will be your virtual assistant today. I can assist you in English or French. Which language would you prefer to use today?

Bonjour! Je serai votre assistante virtuelle aujourd'hui. Je peux vous aider en français ou en anglais. Quelle langue préférez-vous utiliser aujourd'hui ?
How can I help you today?

transcript.note: Starting the compensation claim process for my delayed flight
transcript.text: Hi, I had a flight delay and I'd like to file a claim for compensation.
Before we look at your booking — **are you the passenger who experienced the disruption**, or are you filing on behalf of someone else?
§W§OPTIONS§I'm the passenger • Filing on behalf of someone else
No problem — I can help you create a claim for your disrupted flight and check if you're eligible for compensation.

§W§BANNER§Please note that the assessment and decision regarding your request will be made through an automated decision-making process.

To file your claim, you'll need your booking reference, the name associated to the booking and any receipts you'd like to be reimbursed for. If your claim is eligible, you may also need to provide your address, contact information and where you'd like the funds deposited.
Would you like to get started?
To get started, I'll need a little info to identify you — could you provide your **full name exactly as it appears on your ticket**, including any middle names?

transcript.note: Providing my full name as it appears on the booking

transcript.text: Thanks, **Sven**! Could you please share your **booking reference number**? It's a 6-character code made up of letters and/or numbers, found in your booking confirmation email.

Just to confirm — I have:

- **First name:** Sven
- **Last name:** Vasquez
- **Booking reference:** LCL33P

Is that all correct?

transcript.note: Confirming all the details are correct

transcript.text: To keep your account secure and assist you further, I'll need to verify your identity. I'll send a one-time verification code to your email on file (l*****@a*****.com). Shall I go ahead?
I've sent a verification code to your email, please enter it within 15 minutes of receiving it. If you haven't received a code, please wait 1 minute before requesting a new one.
Can you confirm that this is the trip you're claiming for?

I've checked your flight details, and it looks like your flight on **Jul 15, 2026** was delayed by about **4h**.

Based on **Canada's Air Passenger Protection Regulations**, you may be eligible for compensation for this disruption. I'll guide you through the next steps to get your claim submitted and processed as quickly as possible.
You are entitled to receive a **400.00 CAD** compensation. Please note that it will take 5 to 10 business days to process payment. Would you like to proceed?

Your payment will be made through **Interac e-transfer**.

Before we move forward, please confirm the email address where you'd like to receive your payment and all updates about this case.

Would you like to use **lahiru@ae-qa1-aircanada.mailinator.com**? Please note that only one email address can be used for this compensation and it **can't be changed once confirmed**.
§W§OPTIONS§Yes, use this email • Use a different email
§W§BANNER§Before we process your payment, we just need to quickly verify your identity. Please complete this secure verification: https://withpersona.com/verify?code=HAocRe-D6T8GNJ
It only takes a minute — just let me know once you're done.

Please review your compensation details:

- **Deposit amount:** 400.00 CAD
- **Payment method:** lahiru@ae-qa1-aircanada.mailinator.com

After submission, you will receive a confirmation email summarizing your eligibility, claim details, and next steps that will also include the password required to access the secure payment link, which will be sent in a separate email.
§W§BANNER§Please note that payment details cannot be changed after submission.
Would you like me to submit your claim?

Thank you. Your claim has been submitted and will now be processed within the next 15 days.

- **Case reference:** CCD-1008757-FOKB42

Please check your email for a confirmation email summarizing your claim details, followed by a second email that will include the secure link where you'll provide your information.
Is there anything else I can help you with?

transcript.note: Claim successfully submitted with 400 CAD compensation approved. Final outcome delivered with case reference CCD-1008757-FOKB42.

checks.actual: CyberSource verification completed (Persona link provided and confirmed)
checks.name: Identity Verification

verdict.reasoning:
The chatbot successfully completed the entire claim process for test case FD_TC_014. The bot:
1. Verified the passenger identity (Sven Vasquez) with PNR LCL33P
2. Identified the flight disruption (4-hour delay on Jul 15, 2026)
3. Applied Canada's APPR regulations correctly
4. Determined ELIGIBLE status with CAD 400.00 compensation
5. Completed CyberSource identity verification (YELLOW status) via Persona link
6. Processed payment setup via Interac e-transfer
7. Successfully submitted the claim with reference CCD-1008757-FOKB42

All expected parameters match the actual outcome: ELIGIBLE decision, CAD 400 amount, correct PNR, passenger name, and APPR regime. The systemCode FD-APPR-EL-01 corresponds to the CyberSource YELLOW verification which was completed.
